name: @adl-spec/model
description: TypeBox model for the ADL document schema — the single source that emits the canonical, language-neutral JSON Schemas under core/<id>/. Language SDK bindings (TypeScript, Python, …) are generated in the implementations repo from these schemas.

scripts.build: bun run build:schema && bun run build:profiles
scripts.verify: bun run verify:schema && bun run verify:profiles
